creator: sylvain@sylvaingarrigues.com
text:
(In reply to Glen Barber from comment #14)

Hi Glen, like I said in comment #12, you may leave the VMSIZE setting as is in the global Makefile.vm and instead add

export VMSIZE=10240M

in release/tools/gce.conf

just like Colin Percival did in release/tools/ec2.conf
